name: Authentik
description: Protect any site (reverse proxy, served files, ...) with Authentik forward authentication (auth_request).

USE_AUTHENTIK.help: Activate Authentik forward authentication for this site.
USE_AUTHENTIK.label: Use Authentik

AUTHENTIK_URL.help: Base URL of the Authentik outpost (e.g. http://authentik:9000 for the embedded outpost or http://outpost:9000 for a standalone one). The plugin will append /outpost.goauthentik.io to this URL.
AUTHENTIK_URL.label: Authentik outpost URL

AUTHENTIK_OUTPOST_PATH.help: Local URL path under which the Authentik outpost endpoints (auth, start, callback, sign_out, ...) are exposed on this site. Must start with /.
AUTHENTIK_OUTPOST_PATH.label: Outpost local path

AUTHENTIK_SSL_VERIFY.help: Verify the TLS certificate of the Authentik outpost (used both by the Lua auth subrequest and the outpost proxy_pass).
AUTHENTIK_SSL_VERIFY.label: Verify Authentik TLS certificate

AUTHENTIK_TIMEOUT.help: Timeout (ms) for the Lua auth subrequest to the Authentik outpost.
AUTHENTIK_TIMEOUT.label: Auth subrequest timeout (ms)

AUTHENTIK_PROXY_BUFFER_SIZE.help: Value used for proxy_buffer_size on this server. Authentik sets large response headers that may overflow the default buffer.
AUTHENTIK_PROXY_BUFFER_SIZE.label: proxy_buffer_size

AUTHENTIK_PROXY_BUFFERS.help: Value used for proxy_buffers on this server. Authentik sets large response headers that may overflow the default buffers.
AUTHENTIK_PROXY_BUFFERS.label: proxy_buffers
